name: rawgentic
description: SDLC workflow skills for Codex and Claude Code: project setup, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, refactoring, documentation, dependency updates, security audits, performance optimization, incident response, test suite creation, and cross-model adversarial review.

interface.shortDescription: SDLC workflow skills with TDD, quality gates, and project config.
interface.longDescription: Rawgentic packages 19 workflow and workspace skills for disciplined software delivery. This Codex Phase 1 package exposes the skills through a private marketplace while Codex hook support is planned for Phase 2.
defaultPrompt: Create a tracked issue with rawgentic.
Implement a GitHub issue with rawgentic.
Interview me before building a feature.
